## Review checklist

- [ ] PR title follows our conventions — see [CONTRIBUTING.md § PR requirements](../CONTRIBUTING.md#pr-requirements).
- [ ] PR is focused — one feature or fix per PR.
- [ ] Tests included where applicable.
- [ ] Docs updated where applicable.
- [ ] I have signed the [Contributor License Agreement](../CONTRIBUTOR_LICENSE_AGREEMENT.md) (the bot will prompt on first PR).
